notableEvents.detail: Nick Castellanos flies out to left fielder Nathan Church.

notableEvents.label: Nick Castellanos pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Castellanos homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Xander Bogaerts scores.

notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Jordan Walker. Ramón Laureano scores.
